catalysts_general: Discovery: Micron sits at the center of the HBM upcycle after putting HBM4 for NVIDIA Vera Rubin into high-volume production in mid-March while industry trackers continue to describe 2026 HBM supply as effectively sold out.

growth_picks.analyst_take: IPF label expansion for nebulized Tyvaso and positive ralinepag Phase 3 results create a multi-year growth runway, reinforced by a $2B buyback; near-term earnings and ATS data are catalysts.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Broadcom is still the best non-Nvidia chip-and-networking lever on AI clusters after March earnings showed AI semiconductor revenue of $8.4 billion, up 106% year over year, with Q2 AI revenue guided to $10.7 billion and fresh April evidence of TPU-related demand from Anthropic and Google.

catalysts_general: Discovery: CSGP is down about 60% from its 52-week high and roughly 1% above its low as Homes.com spending wrecked near-term EPS; the April 28, 2026 earnings report, activist pressure, and the newly authorized $700 million buyback are concrete stop-the-bleeding catalysts, but if Homes.com monetization slips again the stock can stay dead money.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Apr 6 White House action expands Section 232 duties on aluminum/steel/copper articles and maintains 200% tariffs on Russian aluminum—improving relative economics for US smelters like Alcoa.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Alcoa benefits from an aluminum price rally and new U.S. tariff actions, but shares sit near 52-week highs ahead of the April 16 earnings call—prefer waiting for a pullback or post-print clarity.

catalysts_general: Discovery: GE Vernova remains one of the cleanest AI-power infrastructure beneficiaries as utilities and hyperscalers race to secure generation and grid equipment for data-center demand.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Qatar helium shutdown and Hormuz shipping constraints threaten 30%+ of global helium supply; fabs and hospitals face surcharges/shortages—supportive for APD’s industrial gases pricing and supply contracts.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Quality industrial gases leader, but helium disruptions and elevated capex/valuation limit near-term upside—wait for a pullback or clearer project milestones.

catalysts_general: Discovery: The April 25, 2026 ban on short-term Russian LNG into Europe and Platts' exclusion of Russia-origin cargoes tighten Atlantic Basin replacement demand just as Venture Global is pushing higher Plaquemines throughput and signing long-term contracts.
growth_picks.analyst_take: EU short-term Russian LNG ban and Plaquemines ramp should aid demand, but heavy leverage, negative FCF, and ongoing customer arbitration cap near-term upside.

catalysts_general: Discovery: Washington's April 2-6, 2026 tightening of Section 232 treatment on copper derivatives should widen the U.S. copper premium, and Freeport is the cleanest large-cap domestic beneficiary because its North American system includes mines, a smelter and downstream rod exposure.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Leverage to tight copper cycle and U.S. policy tailwinds, but shares near highs with Indonesian restart/smelter uncertainties; await Q1 update or pullback.

catalysts_general: Discovery: The same April 2026 Section 232 tightening strengthens the case for domestic steel pricing power, and Steel Dynamics is a direct beneficiary because it is one of the largest U.S. steel producers with broad domestic mill and fabrication exposure.
growth_picks.analyst_take: Tariff tightening and strong Q1 guidance support pricing, but shares trade near highs with limited upside; prefer pullbacks.
